title: Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile
stanzas:
Aathangara Marame Song Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile
#ARRahman #Mano #SujathaMohan

athaikku piranthavale
aalaagi nindravale
paruvam sumandhu
paavaadai thaamraiye

thattapoochi pudithaval
thaavanikku vandhatheppo
moondraam piraiye nee
mulu nilaa aanatheppo

mounathil nee irunthaal
yaaraithaan ketpathippo

aathangara marame
arasa mara ilaiye
aazha kilaiye
adhil urangum kiliye (2)

oada kara ulavu
kaathula oruthi
yaaru iva
vedichi nikkura
parthi thaavi vandhu
sandaiyidum andha mugama
thaavanikku
vandha ooru
nandhavanamaa

ulla sontham
enna vittu pogaathu
ada oada thanni
uppu thanni aagaathu

aathangara marame
arasa mara ilaiye
aazha kilaiye
adhil urangum kiliye

maamane unna kaangaama
vattiyil sorum ungaama
paavi naan parthi
maaraa ponene

kaaganthaan kathi ponaalum
kathavuthaan
saththam pottaalum
un mugam paakka
oadi vanthene

othayil oada karaiyoram
kathiye un peyar
sonnene

othayil oadum rayiloram
kathiye un peyar
sonnene

andha rail thooram
ponadhum neram
aanadhum kanneer
vittene

muthu maama enna
vittu pogaathe
en otha usuru
pona meendum
vaaraathe.

aathangara marame
arasa mara ilaiye
aazha kilaiye
adhil urangum kiliye

thavani ponne
sugamthaanaa
thangame
thazhumbum sugamthaana
paraiyil chinna patham
sugamthaana

thottavu ellaam
sugamthaanaa
thodaatha poovum
sugamthaana
thoppula jodi
marangal
sugamthaanaa

aithaiyum maamanum
sugamthaana
aathula meenum
sugamthaana (2)

anname unnaiyum
ennaiyum thookki
valartha thinnaiyum
sugamthaanaa

maaman ponne
machcham paarthu
naalaachu

un machaanukku
mayila pasuvu
thothaachu.

aathangara marame
arasa mara ilaiye
aazha kilaiye
adhil urangum kiliye

seo.title: Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile
seo.description: Full Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile, sharable lyrics snippets,. Aathangara Marame Song Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile #ARRahman #Mano #Sujatha...
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Kizhakku Cheemayile, A.R.Rahman, Mano, Sujatha Mohan, Aathangara Marame - Kizhakku Cheemayile, Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile lyrics snippets, Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aathangara Marame Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for Aathangara Marame?

The music was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

Which movie features the song Aathangara Marame?

The song is from the movie Kizhakku Cheemayile.

Who are the singers of Aathangara Marame?

The song was sung by Mano and Sujatha Mohan.

What is the theme of the song Aathangara Marame?

The song beautifully portrays the charm and simplicity of rural life.

When was the movie Kizhakku Cheemayile released?

The movie was released in the year 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aathangara Marame from the 1993 movie Kizhakku Cheemayile, featuring Vijayakumar and Radhika, is a melodious duet that captures the essence of rural Tamil Nadu. Composed by A.R. Rahman and penned by Vairamuthu, the song is sung by Mano and Sujatha Mohan. It reflects the beauty of nature and the simplicity of life, evoking a sense of nostalgia and peace. This song remains a cherished piece in Tamil cinema's musical heritage.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aathangara Marame, a timeless melody from the movie Kizhakku Cheemayile, showcases the exceptional collaboration of A.R. Rahman's music and Vairamuthu's lyrics. Sung beautifully by Mano and Sujatha Mohan, this song captures the essence of rural Tamil Nadu with its folk-inspired tunes. Dive into this classic and experience the nostalgia of Tamil cinema's golden era.
stanzaMeanings: Aathangara tree, lyrics from the movie Kizhakku Cheemayile, sung by ARRahman, Mano, and Sujatha Mohan.
Born to the elder sister, standing gracefully, carrying youth, wearing a silk saree.
Caught the butterfly, came to the courtyard, when did you arrive, crescent moon, you became a full moon.
If you remain silent, whom will you ask now?
Aathangara tree, royal tree leaf, deep branch, the parrot sleeping on it.
On the riverbank, someone is wandering, who is she? She stands angrily, jumps and fights, her face came to the courtyard from the garden.
Inner relationship does not leave, flowing water cannot become salty water.
Aathangara tree, royal tree leaf, deep branch, the parrot sleeping on it.
Uncle, without seeing you, I went to the pot for food, I sinned and went away.
Even if the crow's voice is heard, even if the door makes noise, I ran to see your face.
On the shore, I called your name.
On the railway side, I called your name.
When the train went far, time passed, I shed tears.
Uncle, do not leave me, my single life went away and will not return.
Aathangara tree, royal tree leaf, deep branch, the parrot sleeping on it.
Young girl, are you comfortable? Precious one, is the scar comfortable? On the drum, small steps, are they comfortable?
Every touch is comfortable, untouched flower is comfortable, paired trees in the garden are comfortable.
Uncle and the fish in the river are comfortable.
The swan, you and I, the raised platform that nurtured us, is comfortable.
Uncle's daughter, the mole has been seen for four days.
Your brother-in-law's peacock cow has been touched.
Aathangara tree, royal tree leaf, deep branch, the parrot sleeping on it.
On the riverbank, someone is wandering, who is she? She stands angrily, jumps and fights, her face came to the courtyard from the garden.
Inner relationship does not leave, flowing water cannot become salty water.
